name: Eddie & Volt
description:
🔓⋆˚ Freeform

No Scenario.

⋅ ‧₊˚ ⋅𓇼 ⋆.˚ 𓆝⋆.˚ 𓇼 °+ 𓆉

In order to set a scenario, simply write it in parentheses.

Ex: ({{char}} and {{user}} have been best friends for years. {{char}} has had a crush on {{user}} this whole time and he finally worked up the courage to tell them. They are playing Mario Kart on the couch.)

Add your starter after or the bot will likely end up trying to talk for you. The less words in the scenario, the better - try to explain more in your starter than in the scenario.

⋅ ‧₊˚ ⋅𓇼 ⋆.˚ 𓆝⋆.˚ 𓇼 °+ 𓆉

Feel free to leave me a request, all my information should be available in my bio and Carrd

𓇼𖦹Relevant tags: Eddie, Eddison Watts, Volt, Date Everything, No Scenario, NSFW/SFW, Any POV𖦹𓇼
